creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin

As we already have USE_GITHUB and USE_GITLAB... is this really a common use case?

You might want to use 'git-archive' and also checkout the submodules, if any exist.
See for example devel/qt5/files/create_kde-qt_release.sh that creates the qt5 distfiles.

mfg Tobias
